Return the path to the local data cache

Source: R/utils.R
vw_cache_path.Rd

Returns the directory where VietnamWarData stores downloaded files. Useful for inspecting or manually managing cached data.

Usage

vw_cache_path()

Value

A character string giving the cache directory path.

Examples

vw_cache_path()
#> [1] "/home/runner/.cache/R/VietnamWarData"
